keyFindings.title: Audit should add evidence capture and remediation lenses
keyFindings.summary: The mode already has score/severity; it needs stronger deterministic evidence hooks, accessibility snippets, and hardening edge-case matrices.

keyFindings.title: Brand-vs-Product operating register is the first dependency
keyFindings.summary: A shared register should gate density, motion, color, copy, and anti-slop decisions before mode-specific references branch.

keyFindings.title: Foundations should add register-aware color, data-viz color, and adaptation matrices
keyFindings.summary: Existing basics are covered; the gaps are decision matrices and domain-specific token applications.

keyFindings.title: Interface needs operational checklists more than more aesthetics
keyFindings.summary: Add dials, mechanical preflight, redesign intake, copy/mock-data discipline, and visual-asset strategy as references/assets.

keyFindings.title: md-generator expansion should be forward authoring, not extraction sprawl
keyFindings.summary: The extractor is already mature; add a brief-to-style-reference authoring reference and prompt assets that preserve cardinal fidelity boundaries.

keyFindings.title: Motion should add pattern cards and failure-mode checklists
keyFindings.summary: Current references cover principles; reusable assets should make state patterns, AnimatePresence review, and performance checks easier to apply.

keyFindings.text: Audit deliverable is a report yet ships 0 assets -> AU-A1 report template is strongest first-asset
Data-viz is the only real coverage hole (data only as tabular-nums)
Vendored base draws on NONE of the assigned taste corpus; calibration is aesthetic not mechanical
Zero assets; the two-pass process is prose only -> IF-A1 design_plan_preflight is the first asset
Most mature mode; mostly do-NOT; gap-10 forward-authoring is out-of-scope design-spec surface
Gesture basics covered; real 08e gap is the emil frequency-decision restraint gate
Transform verbs (bolder/quieter/distill) are register-gated (AU-R3, depends on XC-1)
shared/register.md (gap 05, must-add) absent; highest single leverage; gates interface+audit
No model-tell catalog; impeccable supplies a concrete Codex/Gemini/2026-general one (AU-R1, highest leverage)
redesign-skill is a turnkey Scan->Diagnose->Fix remediation playbook (AU-R2)
Three-dials intake (taste §0-1) is cross-cutting; ownership ambiguous
Zero-assets pattern across 4 of 5 modes; N1/N2 are shared twins (author once, reference twice)
